title: Emotion Companion SFT (Alpaca style)
description: One training record for supervised fine-tuning. Read by LLaMA-Factory via the 'alpaca' formatting with column mapping in data/dataset_info.json. The 'system' field is REQUIRED in this project (see ADR-0006: persona must be baked into weights, not only cued at inference). Validate as JSON Schema Draft 2020-12.

instruction.description: The user turn. What the user actually said.

input.description: Optional context or additional input. Usually empty for dialogue data; kept for Alpaca compat.

output.description: The assistant's target reply. Must be in character for the persona declared in 'system'.

system.description: Full persona system prompt. Source of truth is the markdown file under personas/; this field holds a concrete expansion (usually the full persona document content). Required — we never train without explicit persona.

history.description: Prior turns in the same conversation, oldest first. Each element is a [user, assistant] pair of strings.

persona_id.description: Optional provenance: which personas/*.md file generated this record. Useful for eval slicing; LLaMA-Factory ignores it.

language.description: Optional ISO 639-1 code. Used for per-language eval bucketing.
